tweet_text: 🚨 Ollie Watkins scores to seal Aston Villa's 2-0 win over West Ham, solidifying their spot in the Premier League's top four! Youri Tielemans makes an impactful return after injury! 🔥⚽ #AVFC #PremierLeague
article_title: Ollie Watkins puts seal on Villa’s win over West Ham after England omission
